id.description: Unique identifier used for the listbox and item ids.

value.description: Current composer value. Bind this to the same value as ChatInput.

triggers.description: Trigger characters that open the popover. Default `['/', '@']`.

offset.description: Distance in px between the caret and popover. Default `6`.

unsupportedProps.name: composer
unsupportedProps.description: Render the ChatInput or compatible composer with the provided overlay props.

unsupportedProps.name: empty
unsupportedProps.description: Optional empty state rendered when filtering produces no matching rows.

unsupportedProps.name: item
unsupportedProps.description: Optional custom row contents. Defaults to the item label and description.

unsupportedProps.name: ondismiss
unsupportedProps.description: Invoked when Escape, trigger loss, or outside pointerdown dismisses the popover.

unsupportedProps.name: onselect
unsupportedProps.description: Invoked when an enabled item is selected by keyboard or pointer.
